name: Restaurante Smoix
description: A Bib Gourmand distinction from the Michelin Guide held since 2023, a recommended plaque in the 2026 guide and one of the island's longest-standing Repsol Guide Sols, in the heart of Ciutadella. Mediterranean cooking built on local produce, with refined technique and international touches, from chef Germán Blanch.

highlights: a Bib Gourmand table in the Michelin Guide since 2023, plus a Repsol Guide Sol
Mediterranean cooking of organic, seasonal produce
book ahead, right in the centre of Ciutadella
